description: Style NoteA boldly ethnic pair of sandals in a lovely design by catwalk. Show this covetable piece off by styling it with tonal salwar suits for an ethnic glam vibe. If you're going for a funky, no-rules style boho look, this piece will suit your needs just right!Heel: 2.5 cmProduct DetailsGreen sandal with a velvetty toe-holder and midfoot strap Soft footbed with a heel patchTapering slim heel with a plastic heel capSmooth outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
